message:
Add shutdown phase completion and fix datagram peek_from address parsing

- listener.rs: Mark shutdown signal as stopped when connection manager drains
  completely after force-close phase; add comprehensive test verifying force
  close path correctly transitions to Stopped phase with proper timing
- datagram.rs: Add socket_addr_from_storage() to properly parse sockaddr_storage
  into SocketAddr, handling pathname, abstract (Linux), and unnamed sockets;
  fix peek_from to use actual source address instead of placeholder, enabling
  correct sender identification for datagram receivers

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
